emails.subject: Re: Daily EES Sales 2/27
emails.body: Re: Daily EES Sales 2/27 Kate, In the future could you please send a copy of the daily EES sales to West.realtime@enron.com It would be much appreciated. Thanks, Bill

emails.subject: Re: Daily EES Sales 2/27
emails.body: No problem. It occured to me, as the list of people I'm sending this to continues to grow, that maybe I should fine tune the format a little. If you guys have any suggestions about the layout of the spreadsheet, please let me know. Thanks, Kate Enron Capital Trade Resources Corp. From: Bill Williams III 02/26/2001 02:39 PM
